name: freshdesk-automation
description: Automate Freshdesk helpdesk operations including tickets, contacts, companies, notes, and replies via Rube MCP (Composio). Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Create, update, and search support tickets with custom fields and priority levels
Manage contacts and companies including bulk import operations
Add replies and private notes to tickets with HTML formatting support
Filter tickets by status, priority, agent, date range, and custom queries
View ticket conversations and conversation history
Resolve entity IDs through email and domain lookups
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The SKILL.md file is documentation-only (Markdown format) with no executable code. Backtick patterns detected are Markdown inline code formatting for tool names like `FRESHDESK_CREATE_TICKET`. The hardcoded URL is a documentation reference for MCP setup. No cryptographic code, shell execution, or network calls exist in this skill.
valueStatement: Customer support teams struggle with repetitive Freshdesk tasks. This skill automates ticket management, contact operations, and company workflows through AI-powered tool orchestration.
limitations: Requires active Rube MCP connection with Freshdesk toolkit authentication
Search endpoints limited to 300 results maximum across 10 pages
Cannot directly search companies by name field, requires custom fields
Agent name to ID resolution not directly supported

useCases.targetUser: Customer support agents handling daily ticket queues
useCases.title: Support Agent Ticket Management
useCases.description: Create new tickets from customer inquiries, update ticket status and priority, and add internal notes for team collaboration

useCases.targetUser: Support operations managers onboarding new customer data
useCases.title: Bulk Contact Import and Organization
useCases.description: Import customer contacts from CSV files and organize them into companies using domain-based auto-association

useCases.targetUser: Support team leads managing ticket assignment and escalation
useCases.title: Automated Ticket Triage
useCases.description: Search and filter tickets by criteria, view conversation history, and route to appropriate agents based on priority

promptTemplates.title: Create a Support Ticket
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new Freshdesk ticket with subject 'Login Issue' for customer@example.com with high priority and description 'Customer cannot access their account after password reset'

promptTemplates.title: Search Open High Priority Tickets
promptTemplates.prompt: Find all open tickets with high or urgent priority that were created this week and are currently unassigned
promptTemplates.scenario: Intermediate - Advanced filtering and search queries

promptTemplates.title: Reply and Add Internal Note
promptTemplates.prompt: Reply to ticket #12345 with a solution message to the customer, then add a private note documenting the root cause for the support team

promptTemplates.title: Bulk Company and Contact Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new company record for 'Acme Corp' with domain acme.com, then search for existing contacts with acme.com emails and associate them with this company

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Resolve requester email to contact ID before creating tickets to avoid duplicate contact records
Use private notes for internal team communication and public replies for customer-facing messages
antiPatterns: Do not create duplicate contacts by skipping the email lookup step before ticket creation
Avoid exceeding rate limits by pacing bulk operations and respecting pagination boundaries
Do not use search endpoints for retrieving all records when specific filters are available

faq.question: What do I need before using this skill?
faq.answer: You need an active Rube MCP connection with Freshdesk toolkit authentication. Use RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'freshdesk' to set up the connection.

faq.question: How do I find a contact's ID before creating a ticket?
faq.answer: Use FRESHDESK_SEARCH_CONTACTS with a query like "email:'user@example.com'" to find the contact and retrieve their ID.

faq.question: What is the difference between notes and replies?
faq.answer: Replies are sent to the customer via email. Notes are internal comments visible only to agents unless you set private to false.

faq.question: Why can't I search companies by name?
faq.answer: Freshdesk's search API does not support searching companies by the standard name field. Use custom fields or list all companies and filter manually.

faq.question: How many tickets can I retrieve in one search?
faq.answer: Search endpoints return a maximum of 300 results across 10 pages. Use specific filters to narrow results when possible.

faq.question: Can I edit customer replies in ticket conversations?
faq.answer: No. Only notes added by agents can be edited using FRESHDESK_UPDATE_CONVERSATIONS. Customer replies cannot be modified.
